Title: Network Security Controls Defined
Description: Establish processes and mechanisms for managing network security controls
Family: Build and Maintain a Secure Network

Title: Network Security Controls Configured
Description: Configure and maintain network security controls to restrict traffic appropriately
Family: Build and Maintain a Secure Network

Title: Network Access Restricted
Description: Restrict network access to and from the cardholder data environment
Family: Build and Maintain a Secure Network

Title: Network Connections Monitored
Description: Monitor and control connections between trusted and untrusted networks
Family: Build and Maintain a Secure Network

Title: Risks from Untrusted Networks Mitigated
Description: Ensure risks to the CDE from computing devices connecting via untrusted networks are mitigated
Family: Build and Maintain a Secure Network

Title: Secure Configuration Processes Defined
Description: Establish processes for applying secure configurations to all system components
Family: Build and Maintain a Secure Network

Title: System Components Configured Securely
Description: Apply vendor security patches and harden default configurations on all components
Family: Build and Maintain a Secure Network

Title: Wireless Environments Configured Securely
Description: Secure wireless environments connected to or affecting the cardholder data environment
Family: Build and Maintain a Secure Network

Title: Stored Data Protection Defined
Description: Establish processes for protecting stored account data

Title: Account Data Storage Minimized
Description: Limit storage of account data to what is necessary for business needs

Title: SAD Not Stored After Authorization
Description: Ensure sensitive authentication data is not retained after transaction authorization

Title: PAN Display Restricted
Description: Restrict access to displays of full primary account numbers

Title: PAN Secured Where Stored
Description: Render primary account numbers unreadable anywhere they are stored

Title: Cryptographic Keys Managed
Description: Establish key management processes for cryptographic keys protecting stored data

Title: Cryptography for Stored Data Managed
Description: Manage all aspects of cryptography used to protect stored account data

Title: Data-in-Transit Protection Defined
Description: Establish processes for protecting cardholder data during transmission

Title: PAN Protected in Transit
Description: Use strong cryptography when transmitting cardholder data over open public networks

Title: Malware Protection Processes Defined
Description: Establish processes for protecting all systems and networks from malicious software

Title: Malware Prevented or Detected
Description: Deploy anti-malware solutions on all systems commonly affected by malicious software

Title: Anti-Malware Active and Monitored
Description: Ensure anti-malware mechanisms are actively running and cannot be disabled by users

Title: Anti-Phishing Mechanisms Protect Users
Description: Deploy automated mechanisms to detect and protect personnel against phishing attacks

Title: Secure Development Processes Defined
Description: Establish processes for identifying and managing security vulnerabilities

Title: Bespoke Software Developed Securely
Description: Develop bespoke and custom software following secure coding practices

Title: Security Vulnerabilities Addressed
Description: Identify security vulnerabilities and install vendor patches in a timely manner

Title: Public-Facing Web Apps Protected
Description: Protect public-facing web applications against known attack methods

Title: Changes Managed Securely
Description: Manage all changes to system components using established change control processes

Title: Access Restriction Processes Defined
Description: Establish processes for restricting access to system components and cardholder data

Title: Access Appropriately Defined
Description: Restrict access to system components and data based on business need to know

Title: Access Managed via Access Control Systems
Description: Enforce authorized access to systems and data through access control mechanisms

Title: User Identification Processes Defined
Description: Establish processes for identifying users and authenticating access to system components

Title: User Accounts Managed
Description: Manage user identification and related accounts throughout their lifecycle

Title: Strong Authentication Established
Description: Establish and manage strong authentication factors for users and administrators

Title: MFA Implemented for CDE Access
Description: Implement multi-factor authentication for all access into the cardholder data environment

Title: MFA Systems Configured Properly
Description: Configure multi-factor authentication systems to prevent misuse

Title: Application and System Accounts Managed
Description: Manage use of application and system accounts and associated authentication factors

Title: Physical Access Processes Defined
Description: Establish processes for restricting physical access to cardholder data

Title: Physical Access Controls Manage Entry
Description: Control physical entry into facilities and sensitive areas

Title: Physical Access Authorized
Description: Authorize and manage physical access for personnel and visitors

Title: Media Securely Stored and Destroyed
Description: Securely store handle and destroy media containing cardholder data

Title: POI Devices Protected
Description: Protect point-of-interaction devices from tampering and unauthorized substitution

Title: Logging and Monitoring Defined
Description: Establish processes for logging and monitoring all access to system components and cardholder data

Title: Audit Logs Implemented
Description: Implement automated audit trail mechanisms for all system components

Title: Audit Logs Protected
Description: Protect audit trails from unauthorized modification so they cannot be altered

Title: Audit Logs Reviewed
Description: Review audit logs promptly to identify suspicious or anomalous activity

Title: Audit Log History Retained
Description: Retain audit log history for a minimum period to support investigations

Title: Time Synchronization Mechanisms Support
Description: Synchronize system clocks across all critical systems using industry-accepted time sources

Title: Security Control Failures Detected
Description: Detect report and respond to failures of critical security control systems promptly

Title: Security Testing Processes Defined
Description: Establish processes for regularly testing security of systems and networks

Title: Wireless Access Points Managed
Description: Identify and monitor all authorized and unauthorized wireless access points quarterly

Title: Vulnerabilities Identified and Addressed
Description: Perform internal and external vulnerability scans and address identified vulnerabilities

Title: Penetration Testing Performed
Description: Perform internal and external penetration testing regularly and after significant changes

Title: Network Intrusions and File Changes Detected
Description: Deploy change detection and intrusion detection mechanisms on critical systems

Title: Unauthorized Changes Detected
Description: Detect and alert on unauthorized changes to HTTP headers and payment page content

Title: Information Security Policy Known
Description: Establish maintain and disseminate a comprehensive information security policy

Title: Acceptable Use Policies Defined
Description: Define and implement acceptable use policies for end-user technologies

Title: Risks Formally Managed
Description: Formally identify evaluate and manage risks to the cardholder data environment

Title: PCI DSS Compliance Managed
Description: Assign executive management responsibility for protecting cardholder data and ensuring PCI DSS compliance

Title: PCI DSS Scope Documented
Description: Document and validate the scope of the PCI DSS assessment annually

Title: Security Awareness Education Ongoing
Description: Implement formal security awareness training for all personnel upon hire and annually

Title: Personnel Screened
Description: Screen potential personnel prior to hire to minimize risk of attacks from internal sources

Title: Third-Party Relationships Managed
Description: Manage and monitor service providers with whom cardholder data is shared

Title: Service Providers Support PCI DSS
Description: Ensure third-party service providers acknowledge their PCI DSS responsibilities

Title: Security Incidents Responded To
Description: Implement an incident response plan and be prepared to respond immediately to a system breach
